vision_document:
# Vision Document: LendSmart
## Executive Summary
LendSmart is a digital lending platform...
## Business Context
### Problem Statement
Manual loan processing takes 5 days...
### Business Drivers
FCA Consumer Duty 2023 requires...
### Target Users and Stakeholders
| User Type | Description | Primary Need |
|---|---|---|
| Borrower | Individual seeking personal loan | Fast, transparent application |
| Underwriter | Credit risk assessor | Automated decisioning support |
| Compliance Officer | Regulatory oversight | Audit trail and reporting |
### Business Constraints
- Must comply with CCA 1974...
### Success Metrics
| Metric | Current | Target | Method |
|---|---|---|---|
| Application time | 5 days | < 1 day | Timestamp delta |
| Approval rate | 45% | 60% | Approved/submitted ratio |
| Cost per loan | £120 | £40 | Operational cost / volume |
| Customer NPS | 32 | 55 | Quarterly survey |
| Default rate | 4.2% | < 3.5% | 90-day arrears / portfolio |
## Full Scope Vision
### Product Vision Statement
A fully digital lending experience...
### Feature Areas
1. Digital Origination...
2. Automated Decisioning...
3. Smart Servicing...
4. Open Banking Integration...
### Integration Points
- CRA (Experian, Equifax)...
### User Journeys
Journey 1: Borrower Application (8 steps)...
Journey 2: Underwriter Review (6 steps)...
### Scalability
- 100K → 1M applications/year...
### Long-Term Roadmap
| Phase | Focus | Timeframe |
|---|---|---|
| MVP | Core origination | Q1 2026 |
| Phase 2 | Servicing | Q2 2026 |
| Phase 3 | Analytics | Q3 2026 |
## MVP Scope
### MVP Objective
Prove digital origination reduces time-to-decision to < 1 day.
### MVP Success Criteria
- [ ] 80% of applications completed digitally...
### Features In Scope
| Feature | Description | Priority | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| Online application | Digital form | Must-Have | Core flow |
| ID verification | KYC check | Must-Have | Regulatory |
| Credit check | CRA integration | Must-Have | Decisioning |
| Affordability | Income vs expenditure | Must-Have | FCA CONC 5.2A |
| Offer generation | Automated terms | Must-Have | Speed |
### Features Out of Scope
| Feature | Reason | Phase |
|---|---|---|
| AI chatbot | Not MVP critical | Phase 3 |
| Broker portal | B2B channel | Phase 2 |
| Restructuring | Post-default | Phase 3 |
### MVP User Journeys
Simplified borrower flow (5 steps)...
### MVP Constraints and Assumptions
- Assume Faster Payments available — Risk: batch fallback needed
### MVP Definition of Done
- [ ] End-to-end application in < 15 mins...
## Risks and Dependencies
### Key Risks
| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|---|
| CRA API downtime | Medium | High | Cache + retry |
| FCA regulation change | Low | High | Modular rules engine |
| Open Banking adoption | Medium | Medium | Fallback to manual upload |
| Fraud at scale | Medium | High | ML fraud detection |
### External Dependencies
- Experian API — Owner: Experian — Status: Contract signed
### Open Questions
- Which CRA as primary?
- SCA exemptions for repeat customers?
- Settlement figure API provider?
